subject: [PATCH v4 2/3] cxl/core/region: move dax region device logic into region_dax.c

reviews.author: Jonathan Cameron
reviews.summary:
Reviewer noted that the cxl_dax_region_release function is not being called when a device is removed, and suggested adding a call to devm_cxl_add_dax_region in the region_dax.c file to ensure proper cleanup.

Gave Reviewed-by
reviews.raw_body:
On Sun, 22 Mar 2026 09:16:37 -0400
Gregory Price <gourry@gourry.net> wrote:

2026-03-22.patch_summary: This patch moves the CXL DAX region device logic from the overloaded core/region.c file into a new region_dax.c file, allowing for additional dax-driver integration paths without further dirtying the core logic. The move includes the necessary changes to Makefiles and header files, as well as the removal of redundant code in region.c. No functional changes are made by this patch.
